typography.font_pairing_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' (Editorial Serif Head + Sterile Mono Body/Labels). Breaks the generic 'SaaS' look to establish high-trust institutional gravitas.
rules: H1s must use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter, and tight line height: leading-none. Max size clamp text-6xl.
Overlines, tags, and data labels MUST use JetBrains Mono, uppercase, wide spacing: tracking-[0.2em], text-xs or text-sm.
Body text must use leading-relaxed with IBM Plex Sans for maximum legibility.
Never center-align large blocks of text. Left-align for editorial precision.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). Use border-collapse style layouts with 1px subtle borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows on cards. Flat matte surfaces with sharp inner contrasts.
visual_enhancers.textures: MANDATORY: Subtle SVG noise filter or grain overlay (opacity 2-4%) across the entire page background to make the black feel physical, like cartographic paper or an intelligence terminal.
visual_enhancers.effects: Aceternity style 'Tracing Beam' for the AXXESS Platform cards to show data flow. Use glassy overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/70 border-b border-white/10) for sticky headers.

layouts.hero: Full screen (min-h-screen). Background: Subtle dark topography image. Content: Left-aligned, extremely large Serif H1 ('AI-Enabled Human-in-the-Loop...'). JetBrains Mono overline. Two CTAs: Primary Gold sharp-edge button, Secondary transparent with 1px border.
layouts.problem_section: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density Grid). 1px grid borders exposing the skeleton. Emphasize text contrast. Highlight 'Coordination Overload', 'No Safe AI', 'Scaling Destroys Trust'.
layouts.five_axis_framework: The centerpiece. Interactive grid diagram with 5 distinct nodes. Use an F-shaped hierarchical layout or a staggered bento box. Each axis is a sharp-edged card. Hovering on a card highlights its path using a glowing topographic gold border effect.
layouts.solution_metrics: Massive typography for metrics ('80% Automation', '20% Human Judgment', '100% Institutional Trust'). text-6xl to 8xl. Use asymmetrical spacing.
layouts.axxess_platform: Stacked layers visualization. 6 distinct horizontal or vertical slabs representing the 'Six-Layer Institutional Intelligence' (CICE, SSIA, CHLIS, AGLAE, SIMA, CCAF). Display language support (Assamese, Bengali, etc.) as mono-spaced terminal tags.
layouts.revenue_model: 3-column CSS Grid. 'Triple-Funnel Model'. Use geometric sans for numbers, serif for titles, sharp borders.
layouts.market_opportunity: Dark, sophisticated. Use text-heavy descriptions with subtle map cues. Focus on 'NE India → BBIN/BIMSTEC → Pan India → Global South'.
layouts.traction: Marquee strategy: 'The Editorial Ribbon'. Slow drifting logos/metrics/accelerator names (Forbes DGEMS, iCreate) with serif font, massive gaps, pale text on dark background.
layouts.team: 3-column grid. Monocolor/dark portraits. Name in Serif, Role in Mono.
layouts.contact_and_footer: Contact form with raw Shadcn inputs customized with 1px borders. Footer: Massive bottom space (py-32). Huge logo/text at the bottom.

motion.philosophy: Subtle, controlled, precise. Absolute zero bouncy or playful animations. Think 'unlocking classified data'.
motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is MANDATORY for premium momentum feel. Use subtle parallax on background topography.
motion.hover: Border color shift to Gold. Text color brightens. No heavy scaling (max 1.01x).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on deep black backgrounds. Gold accents must be tested for 4.5:1 ratio against black for text.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for 2D choreography and crisp reveals. Optional: TSParticles for a very subtle, slowly moving background mesh/network in the 'Market Opportunity' or 'AXXESS' layer. Do not over-index on 3D; clarity is king for this demographic.
3d_libraries.rationale: High-trust institutional pitches don't need heavy 3D gimmicks. They need fast, precise, and highly legible visual metaphors.

testing.data-testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-trust, deep-tech institutional website for TriAxis Ventures. Think Palantir × Bloomberg Terminal. DO NOT use generic SaaS templates.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures, with raw div and section for precise 1px grid borders (border-white/10).
Implement a persistent subtle noise overlay via a fixed div with a base64 SVG noise pattern to give the site a 'classified document/terminal' feel.

Typography MUST be implemented: Cormorant Garamond (or similar editorial serif) for H1/H2, IBM Plex Sans (or generic sans-serif fallback) for body, and JetBrains Mono (or ui-monospace) for tags/metadata. Import these from Google Fonts.
The Five-Axis Framework must be a 5-card bento grid with high contrast borders. No soft shadows.
The AXXESS Platform layers should be stacked visually, utilizing 'group' and 'group-hover' in Tailwind to highlight specific layers.
Do NOT center-align paragraphs. Use left-alignment to maintain the editorial/institutional aesthetic.
DO NOT use clear/transparent backgrounds for the navbar; use a strong backdrop-blur with a dark base.
For icons, use lucide-react with thin stroke widths.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and crisp 1px borders.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky/floating elements.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Always use modern button styles like sharp, rectangular buttons with 1px borders and interaction animations relevant to the institutional style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use precise geometric SVGs.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom selection states (e.g., gold background, black text), and precise loading animations are required.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable, but customize them aggressively to remove the 'Vercel-look'.
